title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Elior India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Elior India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Elior India International Enterprises in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Elior India International Enterprises:
Elior India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
